siteDescription: Premium wedding, portrait and event photography. Timeless images, crafted with care.
homepageText: We believe every moment deserves to be remembered beautifully. From intimate portraits to grand celebrations, we bring a calm, creative eye and years of experience to every shoot — so you can simply be present, while we take care of the rest.

about.title: About Us
about.text:
Hello! We're a husband-and-wife photography duo based in the city, with over 8 years of experience photographing weddings, portraits and events across the country. Our style blends candid, documentary-style storytelling with timeless, editorial portraits.

We travel for destination weddings and love working with couples and families who want photos that feel real — full of light, emotion and small details you'll treasure for years to come.

services.title: Wedding Photography
services.description: Full-day coverage of your wedding, from getting-ready moments to the last dance. Includes a second photographer and an online gallery of edited images.

services.title: Portrait Sessions
services.description: Individual, couple or family portrait sessions at a location of your choice. Includes a one-hour shoot and 20 professionally edited photos.

services.title: Event Photography
services.description: Coverage for engagements, birthdays, corporate events and celebrations of any size. Flexible hourly packages available.

services.title: Pre-Wedding Shoots
services.description: A relaxed, fun session to celebrate your engagement — shot at one or two scenic locations of your choice, including outfit changes.

pricingText: Every event is different, so every quote is too. The prices above are starting points — get in touch with your date, location and the kind of coverage you're looking for, and we'll put together a custom package and quote for you. All packages include professionally edited high-resolution images delivered via an online gallery.

testimonials.name: Priya & Arjun
testimonials.text: Absolutely beautiful photos! They made us feel so comfortable the whole day and captured moments we didn't even know were happening. We still get emotional looking through our album.

testimonials.name: Sandeep Mehta
testimonials.text: Professional, punctual and incredibly easy to work with. The turnaround time for edited photos was fast and the quality was outstanding.

testimonials.name: Riya Kapoor
testimonials.text: I've never felt so comfortable in front of a camera. The photos came out so natural and beautiful — highly recommend for anyone nervous about photoshoots!
